arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur manager Ange Postecoglou gives credit to his side for rescuing a point after a "chaotic" match against Bournemouth in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Liverpool, Tottenham and Man United among clubs offered winger once deemed 'the best in the world' out wide
arts.sum: TBR Football can exclusively confirm that Liverpool, Tottenham Hotspur, Manchester United and Arsenal have all been offered the opportunity to sign Leroy Sane. All four...

arts.ttl: Now is the time for the real Spurs to stand up … but what is that exactly? | David Hytner
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou believes pressure can bring the best out of his Tottenham team ahead of their second leg with AZ When Ange Postecoglou does not like a question, usually from a broadcast journalist, he lets them know in pretty short order, latent hostility to the fore. The one he fielded on Wednesday was always coming. Tottenham’s season will be on the line on Thursday night when they face AZ Alkmaar at home in the second leg of the Europa League last 16, trailing 1-0 from the first. And after the season Spurs have had, Postecoglou’s second at the club, it is plain that he could really do with a result. So, Ange, win or bust for the season and also for you and your project. How do you feel about that? Continue reading...

arts.ttl: James Maddison takes fresh swipe at Roy Keane amid ongoing Spurs criticism
arts.sum: "But if you're a player in the Spurs dressing room and Maddison's back in the squad, you wouldn't be looking and going, 'Oh Jesus - he's back today. In a fresh interview with Sky Sports Premier League, Maddison was coy in his response, not directly mentioning Keane by name and said he was fine with criticism being aimed at him but labelled it cheap.

arts.ttl: Micky van de Ven sends defiant Tottenham message before huge AZ Alkmaar Europa League clash
arts.sum: The January signing suffered a hamstring issue late into the weekend's game and with Ben Davies only just back from a muscular problem of his own, it is likely either Romero and Van de Ven start in Europe or one of that duo is partnered by Archie Gray. Having played less on Sunday than Romero, that could certainly be Van de Ven if Postecoglou was saving him to be ready from the off on Thursday evening at Tottenham Hotspur Stadium.

arts.ttl: Spurs undroppable at risk in one of six potential Ange Postecoglou changes vs AZ
arts.sum: Speaking in his post-match press conference last weekend, the Spurs boss did mention the importance of players such as Van de Ven and Cristian Romero getting pitch time ahead of Thursday night, thus hinting at possible starting roles for them. Bergvall looks a definite to start on Thursday night as he is such a key player in the Tottenham team right now.

arts.ttl: Guglielmo Vicario explains why the Tottenham players are still behind Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: We know the importance of the game tomorrow, for everyone at this football club, for us players, for the fans especially. It’s trying to reach your best, which is what we did and also if you want to play high-level football, competition is needed in every position, at every club in the world.

arts.ttl: Finance insider issues verdict on Everton matching Tottenham deal as Dan Friedkin smashes £50m PSR barrier
Ange Postecoglou defends infamous second season trophy comment ahead of Tottenham's Europa League clash with AZ Alkmaar
arts.sum: Tottenham had lost at home to Arsenal in mid-September when Ange Postecoglou clarified his preseason declarations about 'usually' winning trophies in his second season.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou's angry response to reporter who labelled Tottenham's Europa League tie against AZ Alkmaar as 'win or bust'
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou has given an angry response to a reporter who suggested Tottenham's Europa League tie against AZ Alkmaar was 'win or bust' in terms of their season prospects.
